name: Mayhem Mail
short_description: The mail has been scattered! Take on the mail route from hell, recover and deliver the mail to its rightful place! Mayhem Mail is a classic single screen arcade platformer in the vein of Donkey Kong, Bubble Bobble and Mario Bros. with some added puzzle elements.
detailed_description:
The mail has been scattered! Take on the mail route from hell, recover and deliver mail to its rightful place! Mayhem Mail is a classic single screen arcade platformer in the vein of Donkey Kong, Bubble Bobble and Mario Bros. with some added puzzle elements.

  • Features
  • Precision platforming gameplay with some puzzles mixed in
  • Deliver mail through 6 themed worlds with different mechanics
  • Classic 8-bit graphics and chiptune soundtrack for an authentic retro experience
  • Assist Mode for added accessibility

  • Assist Mode for added accessibility
supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain
